summary: A cosmetic change to the invoice summary header broke the format test that still expects the old wording.
root_cause_hypothesis: format.ts now renders 'Invoice #INV-1001 — Acme GmbH' but the test asserts the old 'Invoice INV-1001 for Acme GmbH' string.
proposed_fix: Update the assertion in format.test.ts to match the new header wording.
